mapper.select: SELECT * FROM student_preference WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND year = #{year}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_preference ( student_id, year, choice1_teacher_id, choice2_teacher_id, choice3_teacher_id, file1_path, file2_path, file3_path, status, admin_assign_type, admin_assigned_teacher_id ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{year}, #{choice1TeacherId}, #{choice2TeacherId}, #{choice3TeacherId}, #{file1Path}, #{file2Path}, #{file3Path}, #{status}, #{adminAssignType}, #{adminAssignedTeacherId} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE student_preference SET choice1_teacher_id = #{choice1TeacherId}, choice2_teacher_id = #{choice2TeacherId}, choice3_teacher_id = #{choice3TeacherId}, file1_path = #{file1Path}, file2_path = #{file2Path}, file3_path = #{file3Path}, status = #{status},
admin_assign_type = #{adminAssignType},
admin_assigned_teacher_id = #{adminAssignedTeacherId},
updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND year = #{year}

UPDATE student_preference SET admin_assign_type = #{adminAssignType}, admin_assigned_teacher_id = #{adminAssignedTeacherId}, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND year = #{year}
